articles.author: Sally Younger
articles.title: Advancing Earth Observation at NASA Since Release of Earthrise Photo - NASA Science (.gov)
articles.description: From cameras pressed against spacecraft windows to the most powerful radar ever flown, imaging technology has taken giant leaps since 1968, but the drive to understand our home in the cosmos has remained.
articles.content: When NASAs Apollo 8 crew rounded the far side of the Moon in 1968 and astronaut Bill Anders snapped a picture of Earth peeking above the gray horizon, the image became a symbol of hope in challenging… [+6946 chars]
